purpose: End-to-end view of a Synapse swarm lifecycle: planning, dispatch, monitoring, completion, and (when triggered) circuit-breaker replanning. Connects the per-phase documents into a single mental model and identifies the artifacts produced at each phase (plan.json -> initialization.json -> progress files -> logs.json -> metrics.json -> insights/).
gotchas: Phase boundaries are not always crisp -- monitoring and dispatch overlap during eager dispatch
patterns: Phased lifecycle with distinct write artifacts per phase
conventions: Each phase doc links to the previous and next phase for navigation
